What We Build

Every fence, every material, done right.

From a single backyard gate to hundreds of linear feet along a commercial lot, we handle the full install — layout, materials, and finish. Every job includes workmanship warranty and a clean site when we leave.

01

Wood Fencing

Classic privacy, board-on-board, shadowbox, picket. Pressure-treated pine or cedar, straight posts, tight lines. Stained and sealed on request.

Privacy Cedar Custom
02

Vinyl Fencing

Low maintenance, weather-resistant, looks new for decades. White, tan, khaki, or two-tone. Privacy, semi-private, or decorative picket styles.

Low Maintenance Warranty
03

Chain Link

Galvanized or black vinyl-coated. Perfect for dog runs, backyards, commercial perimeters. Fast install, honest pricing, secure gates.

Dog Runs Commercial
04

Aluminum & Iron

Ornamental aluminum and wrought iron. Rust-resistant, pool-code compliant, built to enhance curb appeal. Matching gates and posts.

Pool Code Ornamental
05

Custom Gates

Walk gates, double drive gates, automated openers. Built to match your fence line, sized to your opening, hung to swing true for years.

Automation Custom Fab
06

Repair & Replace

Storm damage, leaning posts, broken panels, rotten rails. Honest assessment — we fix what can be fixed, replace what can't.

Storm Damage Fast Turnaround
How It Works

Straight process.
No surprises.

Fencing shouldn't be a mystery. Here's exactly how a Vista Fence project goes — from the first message to the final gate swing.

01

Free Estimate

Reach out with your project. We'll schedule an on-site visit, measure, and walk the line with you — usually within a few days.

02

Clear Quote

One price, itemized. Materials, labor, gates, removal of old fence — all spelled out. No surprise line items later.

03

Install Day

We show up on time, dig posts correctly, handle slopes and obstacles cleanly, and keep you updated as the job progresses.

04

Walkthrough

Final walk-through together. Gaps filled, yard cleaned, warranty explained. Only paid in full once you're happy with it.

Selected Work

Recent installations.

A sampling of projects across Bergen and Passaic County — residential backyards, commercial perimeters, dog runs, and custom gates. Every job is built to look good and hold up.

179 reviews.
5.0 stars. Zero fluff.

Pulled straight from verified reviews on Thumbtack, Google, and word-of-mouth referrals. The details people mention most: clean work, slope handling, gap-filling for dogs, punctuality.

About Vista Fence

A small crew. Every job the owner's job.

Vista Fence is a family-run fence contractor based in Garfield, NJ, serving Bergen County and the surrounding Northern New Jersey area. We're not a franchise, not a national chain, not a marketing company that subcontracts your job to a stranger.

When you hire us, you get the owner on-site, a two-person crew that's worked together for years, and a finished fence that we're proud to put our name on. Simple as that.

  • Owner on every job site
  • Free on-site estimates
  • Licensed & insured
  • No subcontracting
  • Workmanship warranty
  • Background-checked crew
Get Started

Let's talk about your fence.

Tell us what you're thinking — backyard privacy, a new gate, storm repair, commercial install. We'll follow up to schedule a free on-site estimate, usually within 24 hours.
